entries.title: Fox Cave, late game & Glyphs
highlights: Added Greater Fox Spirit and Fox items.
Rebalanced current late game items and armours.
Added new late game armour and weapons.
Added Plague to Dark and Dream Devourer drops.
Added Glyphs — 10% chance to drop from Empowered bosses. Only 7 in game at the moment while they get tested.

entries.title: Codex, achievements & UI
highlights: Added Testing Room to the trainer so you can measure your DPS.

entries.title: Boss souls & Spirit Box
highlights: New crafting recipe: IWT Soul — teleport directly to Incarnated Wooma Taurus.
New crafting recipe: IZT Soul — teleport directly to Incarnated Zuma Taurus.
New crafting recipe: DD Soul — teleport directly to Dark Devil.
New rebirth item: Spirit Box — save one non-Ethereal item between rebirths for 100 souls or 200 tokens.

entries.title: What's New
highlights: Patch notes are now in-game. Open Options → What's New anytime, or tap What's new on the update bar before you reload.
